# vue-clamp

[![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Justineo/vue-clamp?style=flat&logo=github)](https://github.com/Justineo/vue-clamp)
[![npmx version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/vue-clamp?style=flat&label=npmx&logo=data:image/svg%2Bxml;base64,)](https://npmx.dev/package/vue-clamp)

Clamping primitives for Vue.

Docs and demo: [vue-clamp.vercel.app](https://vue-clamp.vercel.app/)

Package docs:

- Website: [vue-clamp.vercel.app](https://vue-clamp.vercel.app/)
- Package README: [packages/vue-clamp/README.md](/Users/yiling.gu@konghq.com/Developer/Justineo/vue-clamp/packages/vue-clamp/README.md)
- Migration guide: [MIGRATION.md](/Users/yiling.gu@konghq.com/Developer/Justineo/vue-clamp/MIGRATION.md)
- Release notes: [CHANGELOG.md](/Users/yiling.gu@konghq.com/Developer/Justineo/vue-clamp/CHANGELOG.md)

## Development

- Check everything is ready:

```bash
vp run ready
```

- Run the tests:

```bash
vp test
```

- Run the browser-rendered DOM tests:

```bash
vp run test:browser
```

- Build the workspace:

```bash
vp run build -r
```

- Run the demo site:

```bash
vp run website#dev
```
